title: The List 2024
excerpt: Lebanese producer and audio engineer Sleiman Damien is known for his innovative approach to Arabic pop. Collaborating with indie and mainstream artists like Haifa Wehbe, Nassif Zeitoun, and Balqees Fathi, he has made a lasting impact on the regional music scene. His work has amassed over 700 million streams and continues shaping the future of Arabic music.

title: Music Producer Sleiman Damien Analyzes the Track He Created from 'Sound of the Earth'
excerpt: Among the producers who quickly participated in this experiment was producer Sleiman Damien. While each participating producer chose to create a track based on a sample from a specific region, Damien stood out by experimenting with all of the samples, building a new track for each one.

title: Producer Sleiman Damien Pushes the Boundaries of Arabic Pop, One Hit at a Time
excerpt: Lebanese producer Sleiman Damien continues to push the boundaries of Arabic pop, crafting hit after hit while redefining how contemporary Arabic music blends innovation with mass appeal.

title: The Hit Man: Sleiman Damien is behind your favourite music
excerpt: Lebanese music producer and hitmaker Sleiman Damien has worked with some of the biggest names in Arab pop music, from Georges Wassouf to Haifa Wehbe. He’s also attracted to the region’s indie scene, working with Dana Hourani and Zef. Esquire Middle East sat down with him to understand how he’s bridging both worlds.

title: Sleiman Damien: Playing with Eastern and Western Rhythms
excerpt: Behind many major hits that dominated the charts in recent years stands producer and arranger Sleiman Damien. Songs like 'Bel Ahlam' by Nassif Zeytoun, 'Bala Ma Nehess' by Abeer Nehme, and Georges Wassouf’s 'Sahi El Leil' are among the successes shaped by his production, reflecting his vision of treating each arrangement as a renewed artistic piece aligned with the spirit of the time.

title: Sleiman Damien: The Producer Reconceptualising the Music Mainstream
excerpt: Having arranged, composed and produced for pop icons like Assi Hellani, Haifa Wehbe, Georges Wassouf and Nassif Zeytoun, Damien is a driving force behind Lebanon’s pop music industry.

title: Inside the Studio of Hitmaker Sleiman Damien
excerpt: From chart-topping pop ballads to modern Levantine hits, Sleiman Damien has become one of the region’s most influential studio architects, shaping the sound of contemporary Arabic music through a distinctive blend of orchestration and modern production.

title: Lebanese Producer Sleiman Damien Is Redefining Arabic Pop
excerpt: With hundreds of millions of streams across the region, Sleiman Damien has emerged as one of the most impactful producers in Arabic pop, bridging classic Levantine songwriting traditions with modern global production techniques.

title: How Sleiman Damien Became a Hitmaker for the Arab World
excerpt: Working with artists across the Levant and Gulf, Lebanese producer Sleiman Damien has quietly become a central force behind many of the region’s most recognizable pop records, blending musical heritage with a contemporary studio sensibility.
